Status Conference.
Off Calendar Jul-29-2021 Continued To Aug-13-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Interpleader Direction, Discharge Of Stakeholder And Reasonable Attorneys Fees; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jun-18-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Jeffrey Palmer, Esq. (415-655-1300; palmerj@gtlaw.com) of Greenberg Traurig, LLP for Plaintiff.
Ira Lesin, Esq. (415-399-1000; ira@iraleshinlaw.com) for Defendant, Maya Di Napoli.
Thomas McConnell, Esq. (925-935-9400; thomas.mcconnell@msrlegal.com) of Miller Starr Regalia for Defendants, Alexander Tan and Lan Ly Tan.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC's Motion For Interpleader Direction, Discharge Of Stakeholder And Reasonable Attorneys Fees:

Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC's motion to interplead funds is granted in part. The court deems the 100,000 shares of Palantir Technologies, Inc., stock options that Morgan Stanley holds on behalf of Defendant Antonio Di Napoli interpleaded with the court. Morgan Stanley is awarded $4,500 as reasonable fees and costs for commencing and prosecuting this action. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately regarding exercising the options and/or selling them and depositing the resulting funds with the court. The matter is continued to July 30, 2021 for a status conference.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
